verses.text: In that day 'a fountain' shall be opened to the house of David 'for sin and for uncleanness'; idols shall be cut off. The cleansing fount. Christ's blood is the open fountain that washes away sin.
In that day 'a fountain' shall be opened to the house of David 'for sin and for uncleanness'; idols shall be cut off. The cleansing fount. Christ's blood is the open fountain that washes away sin.
False prophets shall be disowned even by their parents, and ashamed of their visions. Lies exposed. When God cleanses, deceit is put to shame.
False prophets shall be disowned even by their parents, and ashamed of their visions. Lies exposed. When God cleanses, deceit is put to shame.
Such a one says he is no prophet but a farmer; 'what are these wounds in thine hands?' — wounds received 'in the house of my friends.' A telling line, pointing beyond to the wounded Christ.
Such a one says he is no prophet but a farmer; 'what are these wounds in thine hands?' — wounds received 'in the house of my friends.' A telling line, pointing beyond to the wounded Christ.
'Awake, O sword, against my shepherd... smite the shepherd, and the sheep shall be scattered.' The smitten Shepherd. Jesus applies this to Himself the night He was betrayed.

Two parts shall be cut off, but 'the third part' He will bring through the fire, refine, and they shall say, 'The LORD is my God.' Refined remnant. God purifies a people through trial and claims them as His own.

Two parts shall be cut off, but 'the third part' He will bring through the fire, refine, and they shall say, 'The LORD is my God.' Refined remnant. God purifies a people through trial and claims them as His own.
